columns.title: Columns
columns.empty: No columns — add field and label.
columns.label: label
columns.placeholder.label: Code
parameters.title: SQL parameters (?)
hint.treeVariables: Set devicePathPattern and variableName in Edit mode, then save.
hint.dataSource: Set data source (root.platform.data-sources.*) and SQL in Edit mode, then save.
hint.sqlQuery: Set SQL query (SELECT / WITH) in Edit mode, then save.
template.uploadHint: Upload Excel/Word template with YARG placeholders: band Band1, fields ${Band1.FIELD}. See YARG docs.
template.notSet: no template — CSV, HTML, XLSX (table); PDF via LibreOffice table
template.bandHint: Field names — uppercase report columns. For Excel (.xls) in Band1 range use ${FIELD} or ${Band1.FIELD} (server normalizes for Excel). For Word — ${Band1.FIELD}. File format by extension (.xls, .xlsx, .docx).
template.xlsFallback: PDF and XLSX with .xls/.docx template via YARG; .xlsx table template unreliable (fallback to table).
kind.label: Report type
title.label: Title
sql.hint: SQL runs in data source schema. Import: POST /api/v1/platform/packages/import.
defaultParams.label: Default values
treeVariables.description: Collects variableName from all objects whose path matches devicePathPattern (* and ?).
editModeHint: In edit mode click Preview or Run to execute the saved definition.
error.devicePathPattern: Specify devicePathPattern (prefix or device path glob).
error.variableName: Specify variableName — variable name on devices.
error.dataSource: Specify data source in root.platform.data-sources (import package or create manually).
error.columnFieldRequired: Each column must have a field
